base_annual_fee.source_clause: Annual O&M Service Fee of INR 3,60,00,000 (Rupees Three Crores Sixty Lakhs only) payable monthly at INR 30,00,000 per month by the 10th of each month.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly O&M fee of INR 30,00,000 payable by the 10th of each calendar month.

escalation.source_clause: Annual fee escalation based on Consumer Price Index (CPI-Combined), effective January 1 each year, capped at 5% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: Variable O&M component of INR 0.02 per net kWh generated, billed monthly with the monthly fixed fee.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Service Provider guarantees minimum Panel Availability of 98.5% annually, computed as (Available MW-hours / Installed MW × 8760) × 100.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: LDs of 1.0% of Annual Fee per percentage point shortfall below 98.5% availability guarantee. LD cap: 10% of Annual Fee.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum LD liability capped at 10% of Annual O&M Fee in any contract year.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: Performance bonus of 0.5% of Annual Fee per PP above 99.5% availability. Maximum bonus 3% of Annual Fee.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Bonus rate of 0.5% of Annual O&M Fee per percentage point of outperformance above 99.5%.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Payment within 21 days of invoice receipt. Faster payment terms reflect solar asset lower maintenance complexity.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Late payments attract interest at prevailing RBI Repo Rate plus 2% per annum, compounded monthly.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 6 months advance notice required for termination, non-renewal, or renegotiation.

validation_warnings: NOTE: CPI-based escalation (not WPI) — use CPI-Combined index, not WPI All Commodities.
NOTE: Effective date January 1, unlike C001 (April 1). Invoice periods Jan–Dec apply new rate from start of year.
